title: HybridDirector
description: Schema for the Hybrid Director — defines roles for routing and composing work across model classes. Static routing contract, not model execution.

director_id.description: Unique identifier for this hybrid director instance

roles.description: Roles available in the hybrid director

active_roles.description: List of active role ids for a specific director instance

routing_policy.description: Routing policy for this director — may be a string identifier or a routing decision object

routing_decision.description: Specific routing decision made by this director instance

forbidden_claims.description: Claims explicitly forbidden by this director

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this director does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — hybrid director is a static routing contract, not model execution

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this director does not claim or prove
